raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to let you know I dont accept the outcome of this investigation and formally request that this charge b reviewed again.The original purchase with XXXX was showing pending on my Citibank card for approximately XXXX XXXX  XXXX suddenly came off leaving us to believe the purchase did not go through, we then proceeded to purchase new tickets with XXXX instead in order not to offset our travel plans.Approximately XXXX weeks later the charges reappeared on our card, this happened with no reauthorization from us.Citibank did not contact us about this charge after such a long lapse of time, which clearly indicates red flag. 
XXXX never n I stressed NEVER sent us any emails or messages confirming flight details or anything, we simply got no correspondence from XXXX WE recently found out through XXXX that the departure leg of the trip was used with the tickets we bought from XXXX but the return leg was canceled by XXXX.We only learnt about this recently by calling XXXX because we got no correspondence about this either from XXXX or XXXXWe only recently also learnt that the return part of the trip was used with a XXXX ticket.It has come to our attention that after realizing that the passengers were double booked which is clearly a against policy, XXXX cancelled XXXX booking without notice. 
Based on these information we are holding both Citibank and skyhighavia accountable for an unauthorized change where services was not provided as originally agreed. 
I respectfully request that this change be reopened and the changes be reversed. 


XXXX XXXX
